briefdescription.para: TODO:

listitem.para: add support for DTD compatibility spec http://www.oasis-open.org/committees/relax-ng/compatibility-20011203.html
report better mem allocations pbms at runtime and abort immediately.

memberdef.name: IS_RELAXNG
memberdef.initializer: ((node != NULL) && (node->ns != NULL) && \ (node->type == XML_ELEMENT_NODE) && \ (xmlStrEqual(node->name, (const xmlChar *) typ)) && \ (xmlStrEqual(node->ns->href, xmlRelaxNGNs)))

briefdescription.para: A RelaxNGs validation state.
A RelaxNGs partition set associated to lists of definitions.
A RelaxNGs partition associated to an interleave group.
A RelaxNGs container for validation state.
A RelaxNGs validation error.
Function provided by a type library to check if a type is exported.

simplesect.para: 1 if yes, 0 if no and -1 in case of error.

memberdef.argsstring: )(void *data, const xmlChar *type, const xmlChar *value, void **result, xmlNode *node)
memberdef.name: xmlRelaxNGTypeCheck

briefdescription.para: Function provided by a type library to check if a value match a type.

parameterdescription.para: place to store the result if needed

simplesect.para: 1 if yes, 0 if no and -1 in case of error.

memberdef.argsstring: )(void *data, const xmlChar *type, const xmlChar *facet, const xmlChar *val, const xmlChar *strval, void *value)
memberdef.name: xmlRelaxNGFacetCheck

briefdescription.para: Function provided by a type library to check a value facet.

simplesect.para: 1 if yes, 0 if no and -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Function provided by a type library to free a returned result.

memberdef.argsstring: )(void *data, const xmlChar *type, const xmlChar *value1, xmlNode *ctxt1, void *comp1, const xmlChar *value2, xmlNode *ctxt2)
memberdef.name: xmlRelaxNGTypeCompare

briefdescription.para: Function provided by a type library to compare two values accordingly to a type.

simplesect.para: 1 if yes, 0 if no and -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Handle a redefinition of attribute error.
Handle a redefinition of attribute error.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlRelaxNGParserCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlNodePtr node, int error, const char *msg, const xmlChar *str1, const xmlChar *str2)
memberdef.name: xmlRngPErr

briefdescription.para: Handle a Relax NG Parsing error.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlRelaxNGValidCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlNodePtr node, int error, const char *msg, const xmlChar *str1, const xmlChar *str2)
memberdef.name: xmlRngVErr

briefdescription.para: Handle a Relax NG Validation error.
Deallocate a RelaxNG grammar structure.
Deallocate a RelaxNG define structure.
Removes the leading and ending spaces of the value The string is modified "in situ".
Deallocate a RelaxNG schema structure.
Compare the validation states for equality.

simplesect.para: 1 if equal, 0 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Deallocate a RelaxNG validation state structure.
Deallocate a RelaxNG document structure.
Deallocate a RelaxNG document structures.
Deallocate a RelaxNG include structure.
Deallocate a RelaxNG include structure.
Allocate a new RelaxNG structure.

simplesect.para: the newly allocated structure or NULL in case or error

briefdescription.para: Deallocate a RelaxNG structure.
Allocate a new RelaxNG grammar.

simplesect.para: the newly allocated structure or NULL in case or error

briefdescription.para: Allocate a new RelaxNG define.

parameterdescription.para: the node in the input document.

simplesect.para: the newly allocated structure or NULL in case or error

briefdescription.para: Deallocate RelaxNG partition set structures.
Allocate a new RelaxNG validation state container.

parameterdescription.para: the default size for the container

simplesect.para: the newly allocated structure or NULL in case or error

briefdescription.para: Add a RelaxNG validation state to the container without checking for unicity.

simplesect.para: 1 in case of success and 0 if this is a duplicate and -1 on error

briefdescription.para: Add a RelaxNG validation state to the container.

simplesect.para: 1 in case of success and 0 if this is a duplicate and -1 on error

briefdescription.para: Free a RelaxNG validation state container.
Allocate a new RelaxNG validation state.

parameterdescription.para: the current node or NULL for the document

simplesect.para: the newly allocated structure or NULL in case or error

briefdescription.para: Copy the validation state.

simplesect.para: the newly allocated structure or NULL in case or error

briefdescription.para: Semi private function used to pass information to a parser context which are a combination of xmlRelaxNGParserFlag .

simplesect.para: 0 if success and -1 in case of error

briefdescription.para: Semi private function used to set the include recursion limit to a parser context.

detaileddescription.para: Set to 0 to use the default value.

simplesect.para: 0 if success and -1 in case of error

briefdescription.para: Cleanup the document from unwanted nodes for parsing, resolve Include and externalRef lookups.

simplesect.para: the cleaned up document or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Pushes a new include on top of the include stack.

simplesect.para: -1 in case of error, the index in the stack otherwise

briefdescription.para: Pops the top include from the include stack.

simplesect.para: the include just removed

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlRelaxNGParserCtxtPtr ctxt, const xmlChar *URL, xmlNodePtr target, const xmlChar *name)
memberdef.name: xmlRelaxNGRemoveRedefine

briefdescription.para: Applies the elimination algorithm of 4.7.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of error, 1 in case of success.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlRelaxNGParserCtxtPtr ctxt, const xmlChar *URL, xmlNodePtr node, const xmlChar *ns)
memberdef.name: xmlRelaxNGLoadInclude

briefdescription.para: First lookup if the document is already loaded into the parser context, check against recursion.

detaileddescription.para: If not found the resource is loaded and the content is preprocessed before being returned back to the caller.

parameterdescription.para: the namespace passed from the context.

simplesect.para: the xmlRelaxNGInclude or NULL in case of error

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlRelaxNGValidCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlRelaxNGValidErr err, const xmlChar *arg1, const xmlChar *arg2, int dup)
memberdef.name: xmlRelaxNGValidErrorPush

briefdescription.para: Pushes a new error on top of the error stack.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of error, the index in the stack otherwise

briefdescription.para: Pops the top error from the error stack.
Pushes a new doc on top of the doc stack.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of error, the index in the stack otherwise

briefdescription.para: Pops the top doc from the doc stack.

simplesect.para: the doc just removed

briefdescription.para: First lookup if the document is already loaded into the parser context, check against recursion.

detaileddescription.para: If not found the resource is loaded and the content is preprocessed before being returned back to the caller.

simplesect.para: the xmlRelaxNGDocument or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: computes a formatted error string for the given error code and args

simplesect.para: the error string, it must be deallocated by the caller

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlRelaxNGValidCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlRelaxNGValidErr err, xmlNodePtr node, xmlNodePtr child, const xmlChar *arg1, const xmlChar *arg2)
memberdef.name: xmlRelaxNGShowValidError

briefdescription.para: Show a validation error.

parameterdescription.para: the node child generating the problem.

briefdescription.para: pop and discard all errors until the given level is reached

parameterdescription.para: the error level in the stack

briefdescription.para: Show all validation error over a given index.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlRelaxNGValidCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlRelaxNGValidErr err, const xmlChar *arg1, const xmlChar *arg2, int dup)
memberdef.name: xmlRelaxNGAddValidError

briefdescription.para: Register a validation error, either generating it if it's sure or stacking it for later handling if unsure.
Implements the normalizeWhiteSpace( s ) function from section 6.2.9 of the spec.

simplesect.para: the new string or NULL in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Check if the given type is provided by the W3C XMLSchema Datatype library.

simplesect.para: 1 if yes, 0 if no and -1 in case of error.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *data, const xmlChar *type, const xmlChar *value, void **result, xmlNodePtr node)

briefdescription.para: Check if the given type and value are validated by the W3C XMLSchema Datatype library.

simplesect.para: 1 if yes, 0 if no and -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Function provided by a type library to check a value facet.

simplesect.para: 1 if yes, 0 if no and -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Function provided by a type library to free a Schemas value.

simplesect.para: 1 if yes, 0 if no and -1 in case of error.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *data, const xmlChar *type, const xmlChar *value1, xmlNodePtr ctxt1, void *comp1, const xmlChar *value2, xmlNodePtr ctxt2)
memberdef.name: xmlRelaxNGSchemaTypeCompare

briefdescription.para: Compare two values for equality accordingly a type from the W3C XMLSchema Datatype library.

simplesect.para: 1 if equal, 0 if no and -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Check if the given type is provided by the default datatype library.

simplesect.para: 1 if yes, 0 if no and -1 in case of error.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *data, const xmlChar *type, const xmlChar *value, void **result, xmlNodePtr node)

briefdescription.para: Check if the given type and value are validated by the default datatype library.

simplesect.para: 1 if yes, 0 if no and -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Compare two values accordingly a type from the default datatype library.

simplesect.para: 1 if yes, 0 if no and -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Free the structure associated to the type library.

parameterdescription.para: the URI bound to the library

memberdef.argsstring: (const xmlChar *namespace, void *data, xmlRelaxNGTypeHave have, xmlRelaxNGTypeCheck check, xmlRelaxNGTypeCompare comp, xmlRelaxNGFacetCheck facet, xmlRelaxNGTypeFree freef)
memberdef.name: xmlRelaxNGRegisterTypeLibrary

briefdescription.para: Register a new type library.

parameterdescription.para: the URI bound to the library

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success and -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Initialize the default type libraries.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success and -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Cleanup the default Schemas type library associated to RelaxNG.

xrefdescription.para: This function will be made private. Call xmlCleanupParser to free global state but see the warnings there. xmlCleanupParser should be only called once at program exit. In most cases, you don't have call cleanup functions at all.

briefdescription.para: Try to compile the set of definitions, it works recursively, possibly ignoring parts which cannot be compiled.

simplesect.para: 0 if success and -1 in case of error

briefdescription.para: Check if a definition is nullable.

simplesect.para: 1 if yes, 0 if no and -1 in case of error

briefdescription.para: Compile the set of definitions, it works recursively, till the element boundaries, where it tries to compile the content if possible.

simplesect.para: 0 if success and -1 in case of error

briefdescription.para: parse the content of a RelaxNG attribute node.

simplesect.para: the definition pointer or NULL in case of error.

briefdescription.para: parse the content of a RelaxNG element node.

simplesect.para: the definition pointer or NULL in case of error.

briefdescription.para: parse the content of a RelaxNG start node.

simplesect.para: the definition pointer or NULL in case of error.

briefdescription.para: parse the content of a RelaxNG pattern node.

simplesect.para: the definition pointer or NULL in case of error or if no pattern is generated.

briefdescription.para: parse a Relax-NG definition resource and build an internal xmlRelaxNG structure which can be used to validate instances.

parameterdescription.para: the root node of the RelaxNG schema

simplesect.para: the internal XML RelaxNG structure built or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: parse the content of a RelaxNG grammar node.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success, -1 in case of error

briefdescription.para: parse the content of a RelaxNG nameClass node.

simplesect.para: the definition pointer or NULL in case of error.

briefdescription.para: parse a Relax-NG <grammar> node

simplesect.para: the internal xmlRelaxNGGrammar built or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Check if the element matches the definition nameClass.

simplesect.para: 1 if the element matches, 0 if no, or -1 in case of error

briefdescription.para: Check if a definition is nullable.

simplesect.para: 1 if yes, 0 if no and -1 in case of error

briefdescription.para: Check if a string is ignorable c.f.

simplesect.para: 1 if the string is NULL or made of blanks chars, 0 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Applies algorithm from 4.3.

parameterdescription.para: the current data or value element

simplesect.para: the datatypeLibrary value or NULL if not found

briefdescription.para: parse the content of a RelaxNG value node.

simplesect.para: the definition pointer or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: parse the content of a RelaxNG data node.

simplesect.para: the definition pointer or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Compare the 2 lists of element definitions.

detaileddescription.para: The comparison is that if both lists do not accept the same QNames, it returns 1 If the 2 lists can accept the same QName the comparison returns 0

simplesect.para: 1 distinct, 0 if equal

briefdescription.para: Compare the 2 lists of element or attribute definitions.

detaileddescription.para: The comparison is that if both lists do not accept the same QNames, it returns 1 If the 2 lists can accept the same QName the comparison returns 0

parameterdescription.para: the first list of element/attribute defs
the second list of element/attribute defs

simplesect.para: 1 distinct, 0 if equal

briefdescription.para: Check if the definition can only generate attributes.

simplesect.para: 1 if yes, 0 if no and -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Compute the list of top elements a definition can generate.

parameterdescription.para: gather elements (0), attributes (1) or elements and text (2)

simplesect.para: a list of elements or NULL if none was found.

briefdescription.para: Also used to find indeterministic pattern in choice.
Detects violations of rule 7.3.
A lot of work for preprocessing interleave definitions is potentially needed to get a decent execution speed at runtime.

listitem.para: trying to get a total order on the element nodes generated by the interleaves, order the list of interleave definitions following that order.
if <text/> is used to handle mixed content, it is better to flag this in the define and simplify the runtime checking algorithm

briefdescription.para: parse the content of a RelaxNG interleave node.

simplesect.para: the definition pointer or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Integrate the content of an include node in the current grammar.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or -1 in case of error

briefdescription.para: parse the content of a RelaxNG define element node.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or -1 in case of error

briefdescription.para: Import import one references into the current grammar.
Import references from the subgrammar into the current grammar.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success, -1 in case of failure

briefdescription.para: Process and compile an externalRef node.

simplesect.para: the xmlRelaxNGDefine or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: parse the content of a RelaxNG nameClass node.

parameterdescription.para: 1 if within an attribute, 0 if within an element

simplesect.para: the definition pointer or NULL in case of error.

briefdescription.para: parse the content of a RelaxNG start node.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success, -1 in case of error

briefdescription.para: Applies the 4.17.

detaileddescription.para: combine attribute rule for all the define element of a given grammar using the same name.

parameterdescription.para: the name associated to the defines

briefdescription.para: Applies the 4.17.

detaileddescription.para: combine attribute rule for all the define element of a given grammar using the same name.

parameterdescription.para: the name associated to the defines

briefdescription.para: Applies the 4.17.

detaileddescription.para: combine rule for all the start element of a given grammar.

briefdescription.para: Check for cycles.

simplesect.para: 0 if check passed, and -1 in case of error

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlRelaxNGParserCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlRelaxNGDefinePtr cur, xmlRelaxNGDefinePtr parent, xmlRelaxNGDefinePtr prev)
memberdef.name: xmlRelaxNGTryUnlink

briefdescription.para: Try to unlink a definition.

detaileddescription.para: If not possible make it a NOOP

simplesect.para: the new prev definition

briefdescription.para: Check for simplification of empty and notAllowed.
Try to group 2 content types.

simplesect.para: the content type

briefdescription.para: Compute the max content-type.

simplesect.para: the content type

memberdef.name: xmlRelaxNGCheckRules

briefdescription.para: Check for rules in section 7.1 and 7.2.

simplesect.para: the content type of cur

briefdescription.para: Create an XML RelaxNGs parse context for that file/resource expected to contain an XML RelaxNGs file.

simplesect.para: the parser context or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Create an XML RelaxNGs parse context for that memory buffer expected to contain an XML RelaxNGs file.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a char array containing the schemas

simplesect.para: the parser context or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Create an XML RelaxNGs parser context for that document.

detaileddescription.para: Note: since the process of compiling a RelaxNG schemas modifies the document, the doc parameter is duplicated internally.

simplesect.para: the parser context or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Free the resources associated to the schema parser context.
Check all the attributes on the given node.
Cleanup the subtree from unwanted nodes for parsing, resolve Include and externalRef lookups.
parse a schema definition resource and build an internal XML Schema structure which can be used to validate instances.

simplesect.para: the internal XML RelaxNG structure built from the resource or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Set the callback functions used to handle errors for a validation context.
Get the callback information used to handle errors for a validation context.

parameterdescription.para: contextual data for the callbacks result

simplesect.para: -1 in case of failure, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Set the callback functions used to handle errors for a parsing context.
Set the callback function used to load external resources.
Dump a RelaxNG structure back.
Dump a RelaxNG structure back.
Dump a RelaxNG structure back.
Dump a RelaxNG structure back.
Dump the transformed RelaxNG tree.
Validate the current node lists against the definition.

simplesect.para: 0 if the validation succeeded or an error code.

briefdescription.para: Handle the callback and if needed validate the element children.

parameterdescription.para: callback data, the define for the subelement if available
callback data, the Relax NG validation context

briefdescription.para: Validate the content model of an element or start using the regexp.

parameterdescription.para: list of children to test against the regexp

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success, -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Validate the given node against the list of attribute definitions.

parameterdescription.para: the list of definition to verify

simplesect.para: 0 if the validation succeeded or an error code.

briefdescription.para: Validate the end of the element, implements check that there is nothing left not consumed in the element content or in the attribute list.

parameterdescription.para: indicate that error logging should be done

simplesect.para: 0 if the validation succeeded or an error code.

briefdescription.para: Find the "best" state in the ctxt->states list of states to report errors about and log it.
Push a new regexp for the current node content model on the stack.

parameterdescription.para: the regexp runtime for the new content model

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success and -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Pop the regexp of the current node content model from the stack.

simplesect.para: the exec or NULL if empty

briefdescription.para: Handle the callback and if needed validate the element children.

detaileddescription.para: some of the in/out information are passed via the context in inputdata.

parameterdescription.para: callback data, the define for the subelement if available
callback data, the Relax NG validation context

briefdescription.para: Push a new element start on the RelaxNG validation stack.

simplesect.para: 1 if no validation problem was found or 0 if validating the element requires a full node, and -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: check the CData parsed for validation in the current stack

simplesect.para: 1 if no validation problem was found or -1 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Pop the element end from the RelaxNG validation stack.

simplesect.para: 1 if no validation problem was found or 0 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Validate a full subtree when xmlRelaxNGValidatePushElement returned 0 and the content of the node has been expanded.

simplesect.para: 1 if no validation problem was found or -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Clear errors in the context, allowing to recover from errors during streaming validation and continue it.

simplesect.para: it doesn's reset the last internal libxml2 error

briefdescription.para: Validate the given definition for the current value.

simplesect.para: 0 if the validation succeeded or an error code.

briefdescription.para: Skip ignorable nodes in that context.

simplesect.para: the new sibling or NULL in case of error.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlRelaxNGValidCtxtPtr ctxt, const xmlChar *value, xmlRelaxNGDefinePtr define, xmlNodePtr node)
memberdef.name: xmlRelaxNGValidateDatatype

briefdescription.para: Validate the given value against the datatype.

simplesect.para: 0 if the validation succeeded or an error code.

briefdescription.para: Skip to the next value when validating within a list.

simplesect.para: 0 if the operation succeeded or an error code.

briefdescription.para: Validate the given set of definitions for the current value.

parameterdescription.para: the list of definitions to verify

simplesect.para: 0 if the validation succeeded or an error code.

briefdescription.para: Validate the given definitions for the current value.

parameterdescription.para: the list of definitions to verify

simplesect.para: 0 if the validation succeeded or an error code.

briefdescription.para: Check if the attribute matches the definition nameClass.

simplesect.para: 1 if the attribute matches, 0 if no, or -1 in case of error

briefdescription.para: Validate the given attribute definition for that node.

simplesect.para: 0 if the validation succeeded or an error code.

briefdescription.para: Check if a node can be matched by one of the definitions.

parameterdescription.para: a NULL terminated array of definitions

simplesect.para: 1 if matches 0 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Validate an interleave definition for a node.

simplesect.para: 0 if the validation succeeded or an error code.

briefdescription.para: Validate the given node content against the (list) of definitions.

parameterdescription.para: the list of definition to verify

simplesect.para: 0 if the validation succeeded or an error code.

briefdescription.para: Find the "best" state in the ctxt->states list of states to report errors about.

detaileddescription.para: I.e. a state with no element left in the child list or the one with the less attributes left. This is called only if a validation error was detected

simplesect.para: the index of the "best" state or -1 in case of error

briefdescription.para: Validate the current state against the definition.

simplesect.para: 0 if the validation succeeded or an error code.

briefdescription.para: Validate the given document.

simplesect.para: 0 if the validation succeeded or an error code.

briefdescription.para: Call this routine to speed up XPath computation on static documents.

detaileddescription.para: This stamps all the element nodes with the document order Like for line information, the order is kept in the element->content field, the value stored is actually - the node number (starting at -1) to be able to differentiate from line numbers.

simplesect.para: the number of elements found in the document or -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Create an XML RelaxNGs validation context based on the given schema.

simplesect.para: the validation context or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Free the resources associated to the schema validation context.
Set the error and warning callback information.
Set the structured error callback.
Get the error and warning callback information.

simplesect.para: -1 in case of error and 0 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Validate a document tree in memory.

simplesect.para: 0 if the document is valid, a positive error code number otherwise and -1 in case of internal or API error.
